title: 6PCS Set 145ml Glass Dessert Bowls/Cups, Cute Footed Dessert Bowls for Ice Cream Trifle Fruit Pudding Snack Salad Condiment Sundae Cocktail Drinks Party
features: Elegant Set of 6 Dessert Cups - Size: 85mm X 85mm X 70.8mm, Ø 85mm,Capacity: 145ml, Weight:225g.

Premium Material - Made of high quality thick glass, clear and smooth, lead free and healthy ecofriendly, safe for eating and drinking. Easy to clean the dessert glass cups,just clean with water and dry with a soft cloth, dishwasher safe.

Classic Design - Classic glass body comfortable in the hand. Each clear sundae bowl design with a wide base bottom, which provides good stability on any table.Clean lines ensure a classic look that will impress your guests.

Multi-function - This glass dessert cups set is perfect for ice cream, trifle, mousse, parfait, sundae, creme brulee, yogurt, fruit salads, pudding, nuts, sweets, sorbet, snack, cocktail, condiment, trifle and holiday party. Even can be candle holders,used these to make scented delight candles.

Suitable for Any Occasion: Whether you're hosting a formal dinner party or a casual gathering, from serving nuts and sundae toppings to refreshing cocktails, these classic dessert cups are a must-have addition to any kitchen.
